finding: Aggregation and integrity classification must be composed into one fail-closed promotion gate. A retained exact-SHA bundle is promotable only when both components agree on complete pagination, SHA membership, and retained counts; the provider cap forbids global completeness or absence claims.
uncertainty: No authenticated live workflow-run enumeration was performed.
The committed tests were not executed in this run.
Promotion does not prove authentication scope, workflow execution, deployment identity, or runtime behavior.
falsification_route: Provide retained pages that one component accepts but the other reports with a different count, SHA membership, page sequence, terminal condition, or provider-cap interpretation.
privacy_boundary: No credentials, private chat, health data, payment logic, or user-identifying material included.
